description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three jobs that all run in the default test stage. The only_serial job uses the python:latest image and runs: apt update -q; apt install -qy libkim-api-dev pkg-config cmake gfortran; kim-api-collections-management install user `cat gitlab-ci-openkim-models.txt`; cd ..; echo $PWD; python --version; pkg-config --version; python -m pip install --upgrade pip; python -m pip install pytest; export PATH=$PATH:$HOME/.local/bin; git clone https://gitlab.com/ase/ase.git; cd ase; python -m pip install --user .; echo $PATH; cd $CI_PROJECT_DIR; python -m pip install --user --verbose .; ls -lh $HOME/.local/bin; cd Python/asap3/test; python --version; pytest -v --slow; cd $CI_PROJECT_DIR/Test; python OpenKIM_EMT_GitLab_CI.py. The py3.9_pypi_ase job uses python:3.9 and runs: apt-get update -qy; apt-get install -qy openmpi-bin libopenmpi-dev; cd ..; echo $PWD; python --version; export PATH=$PATH:$HOME/.local/bin; python -m pip install ase; python -m pip install pytest; echo $PATH; cd $CI_PROJECT_DIR; python -m pip install --user .; ls -lh $HOME/.local/bin; cd Python/asap3/test; python --version; pytest -v; export OMPI_MCA_btl_vader_single_copy_mechanism=none; mpirun --allow-run-as-root --oversubscribe -np 2 pytest -v; cd $CI_PROJECT_DIR/Test; mpirun --allow-run-as-root --oversubscribe -np 2 python parallel/ase_before_asap.py. The py_latest_development_ase job also uses python:latest and runs: apt update -q; apt install -qy openmpi-bin libopenmpi-dev libkim-api-dev pkg-config cmake; kim-api-collections-management install user `cat gitlab-ci-openkim-models.txt`; cd ..; echo $PWD; python --version; pkg-config --version; python -m pip install --upgrade pip; python -m pip install pytest; export PATH=$PATH:$HOME/.local/bin; git clone https://gitlab.com/ase/ase.git; python -m pip install --user ase/; echo $PATH; cd $CI_PROJECT_DIR; python -m pip install --user --verbose .; ls -lh $HOME/.local/bin; python Test/python_dot_h_first.py . --compiler=mpicxx --exclude OpenKIMexport; cd Python/asap3/test; python --version; pytest -v; export OMPI_MCA_btl_vader_single_copy_mechanism=none; mpirun --allow-run-as-root --oversubscribe -np 2 pytest -v --slow; cd $CI_PROJECT_DIR/Test; mpirun --allow-run-as-root --oversubscribe -np 2 python parallel/ase_before_asap.py; python OpenKIM_EMT_GitLab_CI.py. No caches, artifacts, or services are defined.
